For example

Vortice is better with alienus regen supports such as thais / corpo / murphy / gramona / ramona ( special case because copy + arithmetica)
You place them differently
Most right is front
Shall i swap out doresain
Most left is rear
Been kinda using gramona as an off tank so i have time to ramp up prepare cards
Doresain can be good with ogier for snipe, but not for that team, you have too much DPS with 0 synergy together, you might be able to nuke 2 of the units your opponent have, or max 3 by turn 5 or 6
But they can have some nasty combo building to be able to 1 vs 4
Gramona is better 2nd or 3rd position because she is a support that can copy enemies and allies cards
You want her to stay alive more longer than your tank
Your lily is a tank that can be a DPS depending on the build
But the DPS is scaling based on how low she is
Some good type of combo are stuffs like this
<@603663386034831390> since you're new, try to familiarize yourself with different kit of units
Before using the teams above
You have a rare chance to limit test before you reach a stage where you'll lose elo if you lose a game

So you have a more safer shuffle

Both DoT cannot be cleansed, if you didn't killed winkle  the dmg would have been way higher because winkle can vulnerable 2 of your units making it 25% more dmg
The math is basically this = helot 5 charges + 6 cards in hand + enhance buff is 60 AoE dmg
Arachne's exalt make the damages delayed ( uncleansable )
The 4 cost wheel you saw below helot stack sacrifice another uncleansable debuff
The stacks is 50%
And the 2 cost wheel is 25%
Making it a total of 75% sacrifice stacking
If you add everything it's 175% damages bonus on exalt
60 dmg x 175% = 105 DMG AoE that cannot be cleansed
Yeah, the uncleansable is what makes that pretty gross, can't stall it out, have to have something else to lock it down, lol
Also
The team can consistently nuke at turn 3
Unless you're extremely unlucky
